title: Future simple: irregular stems
subtitle: Use the future of the verbs you need most.
duolingoBridge: This expands the future simple without overloading you.
overview: Knowledge point 1: common verbs have irregular stems.
Knowledge point 2: the endings are still regular.

sections.title: Irregular future map
rows: can → I will be able to

items.en: I will be available tomorrow morning.
items.es: Estaré disponible mañana por la mañana.

items.fr: Nous aurons plus de temps vendredi.
items.en: We will have more time Friday.

items.fr: J’irai à la pharmacie après le travail.
items.en: I will go to the pharmacy after work.
items.es: Iré a la farmacia después del trabajo.

items.fr: Je ferai attention la prochaine fois.
items.en: I will be careful next time.
I will have to leave early tomorrow.
